modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need access to Confocal Microscope Computer in Lee Med

full_description_text:
- I want to use the Confocal Microscope Computer.  
- Please give me access to it in Lee Med.  
- I need it for my work, but I can't get in.  
- I don't understand why I can't access it.
short_description: Need access to Confocal Microscope Computer in Lee Med
description:
- I want to use the Confocal Microscope Computer.  
- Please give me access to it in Lee Med.  
- I need it for my work, but I can't get in.  
- I don't understand why I can't access it.
